---
title: "HiTOP Scale Definitions"
output: rmarkdown::html_vignette
vignette: >
  %\VignetteIndexEntry{HiTOP Scale Definitions}
  %\VignetteEngine{knitr::rmarkdown}
  %\VignetteEncoding{UTF-8}
---

```{r, include = FALSE}
knitr::opts_chunk$set(
  collapse = TRUE,
  comment = "#>"
)
```

The sections below contain the brief and client-facing definitions for each scale and its respective subscales.

```{r, results='asis', echo=FALSE}
library(dplyr)
library(hitop)

data_df <- hitopsr_definitions
scales <- unique(data_df$Scale)

for (s in scales) {
  scale_data <- data_df |> dplyr::filter(Scale == s)
  cat("## ", s, "\n\n", sep = "")
  main_def <- scale_data |> dplyr::filter(is.na(Subscale))
  if (nrow(main_def) > 0) {
    if (!is.na(main_def$Brief[1])) {
      cat("**Brief Definition:** ", main_def$Brief[1], "\n\n", sep = "")
    }
    if (!is.na(main_def$Client[1])) {
      cat("**Client Definition:** ", main_def$Client[1], "\n\n", sep = "")
    }
  }
  sub_defs <- scale_data |> dplyr::filter(!is.na(Subscale))
  if (nrow(sub_defs) > 0) {
    for (i in seq_len(nrow(sub_defs))) {
      cat("### ", sub_defs$Subscale[i], "\n\n", sep = "")
      if (!is.na(sub_defs$Brief[i])) {
        cat("**Brief Definition:** ", sub_defs$Brief[i], "\n\n", sep = "")
      }
      if (!is.na(sub_defs$Client[i])) {
        cat("**Client Definition:** ", sub_defs$Client[i], "\n\n", sep = "")
      }
    }
  }
  cat("---\n\n")
}
```
